title: Update footer styling to white background with readable text

requirements.summary: Change the footer background color from bg-gray-800 to bg-white in the Footer component
acceptanceCriteria: Footer background is visually white matching the header

file_operations.description: Replace the bg-gray-800 class with bg-white in the footer's root element to match the header background color

requirements.summary: Update footer text colors to ensure readability on white background
acceptanceCriteria: All footer text is clearly readable against the white background
Footer text uses appropriate dark color classes
Social links and other interactive elements maintain sufficient contrast

file_operations.description: Update all text color classes to dark variants (text-gray-800 or text-gray-900) for headings, paragraphs, links, and social icons to ensure readability against the white background

requirements.summary: Preserve all existing footer styling including padding, borders, layout structure, and spacing
acceptanceCriteria: All spacing between footer elements remains the same

file_operations.description: Verify that all padding, margin, border, layout grid, and spacing classes remain unchanged during the color updates
